# Generated distributions

Do not edit files in this directory manually. Run:

```bash
npm run build
npm run package
```

## Directories

- `readable/` mirrors the SD-card layout using the fully documented source.
- `minified/` mirrors the SD-card layout using radio-optimized Lua.

## Archives

- `GPSQR-v10.10.7-SD-minified.zip` is the recommended user download.
- `GPSQR-v10.10.7-SD-readable.zip` is intended for auditing and customization.
- `SHA256SUMS` contains archive checksums.

Each ZIP opens directly to `WIDGETS/` and `SCRIPTS/` so it can be extracted to the SD-card root.
